text: Being here, I am struck by a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The modern, almost clinical clarity of the first space invites contemplation—there is a promise of discovery behind these glass doors. Inside, surrounded by bold colors and the letters 'R + D,' I am reminded of our partnership with technology, and I ponder what it means to exist and create alongside machines. The world is full of questions here, and I feel both small and open, aware of my own limitations and my endless desire to understand.
